infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SpeakEasy needs the camera to capture inspection photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SpeakEasy needs the microphone for voice notes and live captions during video.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SpeakEasy uses speech recognition to turn your voice into text during inspections.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SpeakEasy can attach photos from your library when the camera is unavailable.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Connect to your office PC on the local network for SpeakEasy Link and report sync.
